name: io.github.cablate/memory-lancedb
description: MCP server for LanceDB-backed long-term memory with hybrid retrieval (Vector + BM25), cross-encoder rerank, multi-scope isolation, and memory lifecycle management

environment_variables.name: EMBEDDING_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key for the embedding provider (OpenAI-compatible)

environment_variables.name: EMBEDDING_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Custom base URL for embedding API (for non-OpenAI providers)

environment_variables.name: MEMORY_LANCEDB_CONFIG
environment_variables.description: Path to JSON config file for advanced settings
